title: campanula lusitanica var. broussonetiana
intro: Campanula lusitanica var. broussonetiana, also known as Broussonet's bellflower, is a perennial plant species within the Campanula genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Campanula lusitanica var. broussonetiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
